description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, slightly distressed rubber and graphic print on the front and stitch detail Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Sport brand adidas have come up with this simple yet fashionable T-shirt. Great style and exemplary comfort combined, this tee is a sure wardrobe favourite - pair it with denims and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo
